calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: JWILLIS-MCGHEE,
CSR: A. HOWELL, #2542
ARNOLD EVJE II, Esq. for Plaintiff: N.R. PATEL.
Plaintiff's Witness N.R. PATEL was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant PAUL HOPPER.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 106 6TH ST., #517, San Francisco, CA 94103.
The lease is forfeited.
PAST DUE RENT - $650.00
Holdover Damages - $1364.58
Costs - $240.00
Total - $2254.58
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of MAY-02-2011 remains on calendar.
